name: @jsonic-co/jsonic-extension
author: The Jsonic Team <support@jsonic.ir>
description: Provides more features to the Jsonic webapp (https://jsonic.ir/)

scripts.build:chrome: JSONIC_EXTENSION_TARGET=CHROME parcel build src/* --dist-dir dist/ --no-optimize && copyfiles icons/* dist
scripts.build:firefox: JSONIC_EXTENSION_TARGET=FIREFOX parcel build src/* --dist-dir dist/ --no-optimize && copyfiles icons/* dist

author: Andrew Bastin
